headline: No reason for investors to change their tune on software yet, says Brent Thill
summary: Jefferies' Brent Thill says the rotation out of software stocks is still continuing as the sector faces 10 Walls of Worry, and that when investors do return they will be extremely selective. He also says that within the sector, he likes infrastructure software companies and cybersecurity companies, but applications would be the last to come back.
